title: Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
company: Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Credit Analyst at our Thane location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates:
Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates!
